headline: HTTP Status Codes
description: HTTP status codes are three-digit numbers indicating request outcome. 1xx (Informational), 2xx (Success), 3xx (Redirection), 4xx (Client Error), 5xx (Server Error). Common: 200 OK, 201 Created, 301 Moved, 400 Bad Request, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found, 500 Internal Error.
